enonce.texte: Match the computer part with its correct name. Write the letter of the correct answer.

questions.texte: This part shows you information on a screen.
This is a flat board with letters and numbers you press to type.
This small device you move to point and click on the screen.
This machine prints documents and images on paper.
This is the brain of the computer that processes information.

enonce.texte: Read the description and write the correct computer part.

questions.texte: I display pictures, videos, and text. What am I?
I have letters and numbers. I help you type. What am I?
I move the cursor on the screen. I have a click button. What am I?
I put words and pictures on paper. What am I?
I process all the information. I am the main part. What am I?
Turn on
Turn off
Click
Type
Save
questions.reponse: To keep a file on the computer

questions.texte: Print

enonce.texte: Complete the sentences with the correct computer vocabulary words: turn on, turn off, click, type, save, print.

questions.texte: Please ______ the computer so we can start working.
To choose an icon, you ______ on it with the mouse.
You need to ______ your name on the keyboard.
Don't forget to ______ your work so you don't lose it.
After finishing, you can ______ your document.
When you finish, ______ the computer properly.

enonce.texte:
Read the instructions and answer the questions.

Instructions for using a computer:
1. Turn on the computer by pressing the power button.
2. Wait for the screen to show the desktop.
3. Click on the file icon to open it.
4. Type your text using the keyboard.
5. Save your work by clicking on 'Save'.
6. To print, click on 'File' then 'Print'.
7. After finishing, turn off the computer properly.

questions.texte: How do you turn on the computer?
What do you do after the screen shows the desktop?
questions.reponse: Click on the file icon to open it.

questions.texte: How do you type your text?
What should you do to keep your work?
questions.reponse: Save your work by clicking on 'Save'.

questions.texte: How do you print a document?

E. Turn off the computer

enonce.texte: Write a short paragraph describing the parts of a computer. Use at least 5 words: screen, keyboard, mouse, printer, CPU, turn on, turn off, click, type, save, print.

questions.texte: Write your paragraph here.
questions.reponse: A computer has many parts. The screen shows the information. The keyboard helps you type words. The mouse is used to click on icons. The CPU is the brain of the computer. You can use a printer to print documents. To use a computer, you turn it on and save your work.

enonce.texte: Complete the sentences with the correct computer vocabulary words.

questions.texte: The ______ shows pictures and words.
You use the ______ to type letters.
The ______ helps you move the cursor.
The ______ prints your documents.
The ______ is the brain of the computer.

To write using the keyboard
To keep a file on the computer
To produce a paper copy
To start the computer

enonce.texte: Create a step-by-step guide (5-6 steps) for using a computer to write a short letter. Use sequence markers like: first, then, next, finally.

questions.texte: Write your step-by-step guide here.
questions.reponse: First, turn on the computer. Then, open a blank document. Next, type your letter using the keyboard. After that, save your work by clicking on 'Save'. Finally, print your letter and turn off the computer.
